rationale: Review 2's findings on includeRight_apply (pure rfl duplicating Mathlib's @[simp]), the map_* and antipode_* specializations (all proved by `simp [map]` or indirection to Mathlib's TensorProduct/Bialgebra.TensorProduct lemmas with id applied), and the unnecessarily-private general helpers (map_antipode, map_id, map_comp) are directly confirmed by the diff and material to the reuse rubric; acting on them removes duplication and improves downstream TauCeti/Mathlib reuse. Review 1's blanket approval misses these concrete reuse issues.
